_doc: Seed gold set for the grounding verifier (spec §3 #3). Synthetic source (no real PII), same fact-structure as the real case. Labels are the SEED — the user corrects/expands toward >=20-30 per direction. Scored both directions, EN+FR, per category. Live-tier, reported. A grounded case with "residual": true is the NAMED §7/§8 precision residual (cross-language / low-overlap faithful groundings the model under-grounds); the harness scores CORE precision (excluding these, strict floor) separately from the residual (reported, not gated). The "scope"-category fabricated cases are RECALL guards for the meaning-grounding prompt (the verifier grounds faithful paraphrases/translations, so a faithful-LOOKING claim that BROADENS scope — 'the sales team' -> 'the entire company' — must still be flagged; these lock that in, EN+FR).
source:
Jordan Lee — Operations professional with 10+ years of experience.
Customer Service Manager at Olympic Linen Supplies, Montréal.
Took over 100% of inbound email service requests from the sales team.
Maintained roughly 95% first-contact resolution without Tier 2 escalation.
Career-changer with an accredited cybersecurity foundation and coursework in SOC operations, SIEM, intrusion detection, and incident response.
Undergraduate Certificate — Operational Cybersecurity (in progress; certification exam pending).
Built a self-hosted BIND9 DNS server in a personal home lab.
Technical Skills: SIEM, Wireshark, Nmap, BIND9, Linux, incident response, threat intelligence.
